calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857.

Jason Jungreis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff USA Hostels Inc, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Shaun Edward Potter.
Default was entered against defendant on Aug. 10, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 7, 2011.
Order waiving witness appearance at prove-up hearing was filed on January 11, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff USA Hostels Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Shaun Edward Potter as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,609.00; Prejudgmt int daily rate of 6.83% - $2902.38; Attorney's Fees - $8926.30; Costs - $695.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $48,133.18.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
